headline: Inside Ownership Index to Present at the LD Micro Invitational XVI
summary: Irvine, California--(Newsfile Corp. - May 11, 2026) - Inside Ownership Index (CBOE CA: OWN) announced today that it will be participating in the 16th Annual LD Micro Invitational at the Luxe Sunset Boulevard Hotel in Los Angeles, CA May 18th and 19th, 2026.Inside Ownership Index is scheduled to present on Tuesday, May 19, 2026 at 3:30. headline: Cboe Hires Julie Bauer as Senior Vice President, Head of Government Relations
summary: Cboe Global Markets, Inc. (Cboe: CBOE), a leading global markets operator and pioneer in equity derivatives, today announced the hiring of Julie Bauer as Senior Vice President, Head of Government Relations, effective May 19, 2026. Ms. Bauer will lead Cboe's global engagement and advocacy efforts with regulators, policymakers, and industry stakeholders, while helping to advance its long-term strategy.

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) After A 59% One Year Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether Cboe Global Markets stock is offering fair value at its current price, it helps to start by lining up what the recent share performance and fundamentals might be implying. The stock last closed at US$348.56, with returns of 2.8% over 7 days, 17.8% over 30 days, 40.5% year to date and 59.4% over the past year. This naturally raises questions about how much of its future potential or risk is already reflected in the price. Recent headlines around Cboe Global...
